programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Lisa Holloway prides herself on providing a home from home at Compton House in Newark, Nottinghamshire. But there are dusty discoveries, and Dave and Jo find the prices hard to swallow.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Dave and Jo Bate hope that their guests will embrace the pub vibe at The White Horse in Ripon, North Yorkshire. But Ed and Jane get locked in their room and it's 'tomatogate' at breakfast.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Former teachers Ed and Jane host at The Old Farmhouse in Cheshire. Some of their guests are surprised to be sharing a bathroom, and Sam and Ian are shocked by what's lurking under the bed.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: The B&Bers meet for one last time to settle some scores and find out how much they've been paid. A heated exchange about cleaning leads to tears before the winner is announced.

programs.title: Location, Location, Location
programs.desc: Kirstie and Phil help more house-hunters make life-changing moves. In Northumberland, Lauren and Noel are set on character, while solo buyer Charlotte keeps getting outbid.

programs.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programs.desc: On North Tyneside, Mark and Suze's emotional ties to their Victorian town house have left them in limbo. Kirstie has a great refurb plan, while Phil plays a wild card.
